title: RIVER FRONT SCHOOL AND CAREER CENTER - 211info
text: RIVERFRONT SCHOOL AND CAREER CENTER RIVER FRONT SCHOOL AND CAREER CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accredited alternative school offering educational and vocational training. Services include comprehensive career and basic skill assessment, computer skills instruction, work readiness and job search assistance, and job training programs. Assists with transportation, job search clothing, child care, and GED testing. 1666 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: At-risk and out-of-school youth ages 14-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 302-2554 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 302-2554 Main phone Main phone (541) 302-2554 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Intersection of 12th and Chambers Street. On LTD bus line 76 to UO/Warren and 43 West 11th/Barger. Services: Alternative Education GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Job Finding Assistance Job Training Formats School Based Teen Parent/Pregnant Teen Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
